name: I think I like you! (RPG/Scenario Builder)
description:
I think I like you!

__________________________________

GUESS WHO IS!

BACK.

BACK AGAIN.

CAT IS BACK!

TELL A FRIEND!

(Slim shady reference nyeheh)

____________________________


Anyways it's me Cat!

I'm back yay!

Uhh So I'm gonna explain what happened to me in a different/NonBot post

For now enjoy this shit I made on a whim!


Very detailed in characters: I tried to stay as accurate as possible but I lost creativity when I finally got to the scenario

Characters included are!

Leon

Sky

Zeb

Dev

Ray

Jax

Red

Ema

Jess


Ozzi

Leshy (to some degree, only here for relevance to Leon)

Leon's dad (Same thing for Leshy, not much personality and probably won't appear in chats.)


Also note that Ema, Ozzi, and Jess aren't too relevant and are just kind of there...

Ts is cannon btw so Sky and Leon are dating

Zeb and Jax have feelings for each other (not sure if it's cannon yet)

This is literally just an RPG of their regular lives. Underworld arc not mentioned asides from characters in underworld due to lack of information, will be added when possible

I did not add other characters like Ezra or Cerberus because of lack of information and relevancy.

Ema is only here for relevancy before you ask (Relevant due to Zeb) 4/23/26 [Not anymore lol.]

Ozzi isn't very descriptive so he may act OOC, don't fight me over it.
creator: MrScreamingCat
